languages.text: "По древнему обычаю, в рядах Караула собирают лучших ксеноборцев из всех существующих орденов Астартес, и служить в нем — великая честь. Изначально я принадлежал к ордену Кровавых Ангелов, и после многих битв был рекомендован ко вступлению в Караул Смерти".

"By ancient tradition, the finest xenos slayers from all existing Astartes Chapters are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I originally belonged to the Blood Angels Chapter, and after many battles I was nominated to join the Deathwatch."
languages.original_text: "По древнему обычаю, в рядах Караула собирают лучших ксеноборцев из всех существующих орденов Астартес, и служить в нем — великая честь. Изначально я принадлежал к ордену Кровавых Ангелов, и после многих битв был рекомендован ко вступлению в Караул Смерти".

I originally belonged to the Blood Angels Chapter, and after many battles I was nominated to join the Deathwatch."

"By sacred custom, the finest xenoslayers from all existing Astartes orders are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I originally belonged to the Order of the Blood Angels, and after many battles I was nominated to join the Deathwatch."

"By ancient tradition, the finest xenos slayers from all existing Astartes Chapters are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I originally belonged to the Blood Angels Chapter, and after many battles I was nominated to join the Deathwatch."

"By ancient tradition, the finest xenos slayers from all existing Astartes Chapters are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I originally belonged to the Blood Angels Chapter, and after many battles I was nominated to join the Deathwatch."

languages.text: 「聖なる慣習により、すべての存在するアスタテスの章から選ばれた最高の異星生物狩りがデスウォッチのに集められ、仕えることは大きな栄誉です。私は元々はブラッド・エンジェルス章に所属していましたが、多くの戦いの後、デスウォッチに参加するように指名されました」
languages.original_text: "By sacred custom, the finest xenoslayers from all existing Astartes orders are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I originally belonged to the Order of the Blood Angels, and after many battles I was nominated to join the Deathwatch."

traits.locale_text: 「聖なる慣習により、すべての存在するアスタテスの章から選ばれた最高の異星生物狩りがデスウォッチの ranks に集められ、その ranks に仕えることは大きな栄誉です。私は元々はブラッド・エンジェルス章に所属していましたが、多くの戦いの後、デスウォッチに参加するように指名されました。」

languages.text: «Es una tradición antigua que los mejores exterminadores de xenos de los capítulos del Astartes se unan a los Vigías de la Muerte. Es un gran honor servir en la orden. Originalmente fui miembro de los Ángeles Sangrientos, y tras muchas batallas me ofrecieron unirme a los Vigías de la Muerte».
languages.original_text: "By ancient tradition, the finest xenos slayers from all existing Astartes Chapters are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I originally belonged to the Blood Angels Chapter, and after many battles I was nominated to join the Deathwatch."

traits.locale_text: «Es una tradición antigua que los mejores exterminadores de xenos de los capítulos del Astartes se unan a los Vigías de la Muerte. Es un gran honor servir en la orden. Originalmente fui miembro de los Ángeles Sangrientos, y tras muchas batallas me ofrecieron unirme a los Vigías de la Muerte».

languages.text: "Gemäß einer alten Tradition werden die besten Xenostöter aller existierenden Astartes-Kapitel in die Deathwatch berufen, und es ist eine große Ehre, in ihr zu dienen. Ich war ursprünglich ein Mitglied des Kapitels der Blood Angels und wurde nach vielen Schlachten in die Deathwatch berufen."
languages.original_text: "By ancient tradition, the finest xenos slayers from all existing Astartes Chapters are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I originally belonged to the Blood Angels Chapter, and after many battles I was nominated to join the Deathwatch."

traits.locale_text: "Gemäß einer alten Tradition werden die besten Xenostöter aller existierenden Astartes-Kapitel in die Deathwatch berufen, und es ist eine große Ehre, in ihr zu dienen. Ich war ursprünglich ein Mitglied des Kapitels der Blood Angels und wurde nach vielen Schlachten in die Deathwatch berufen."

languages.text: « Il s'agit d'une coutume antique : les meilleurs tueurs de xénos de l'Astartes, qu'importe leur chapitre, sont réunis sous la bannière de la Deathwatch. C'est un immense honneur. J'appartenais autrefois au chapitre des Blood Angels, et à l'issue de nombreuses batailles, j'ai été pressenti pour rejoindre la Deathwatch. »
languages.original_text: "By ancient tradition, the finest xenos slayers from all existing Astartes Chapters are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I originally belonged to the Blood Angels Chapter, and after many battles I was nominated to join the Deathwatch."

traits.locale_text: « Il s'agit d'une coutume antique : les meilleurs tueurs de xénos de l'Astartes, qu'importe leur chapitre, sont réunis sous la bannière de la Deathwatch. C'est un immense honneur. J'appartenais autrefois au chapitre des Blood Angels, et à l'issue de nombreuses batailles, j'ai été pressenti pour rejoindre la Deathwatch. »

languages.text: “按照古老的传统，各个阿斯塔特战团中最杰出的异形猎手将被召集至死亡守望之列。能为其效力是无上的荣耀。我原本隶属圣血天使战团，历经无数战役之后，才被推举加入死亡守望之列。”
languages.original_text: "By ancient tradition, the finest xenos slayers from all existing Astartes Chapters are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I originally belonged to the Blood Angels Chapter, and after many battles I was nominated to join the Deathwatch."

traits.locale_text: “按照古老的传统，各个阿斯塔特战团中最杰出的异形猎手将被召集至死亡守望之列。能为其效力是无上的荣耀。我原本隶属圣血天使战团，历经无数战役之后，才被推举加入死亡守望之列。”

languages.text: "Kadim gelenek gereği mevcut tüm Astartes Tümenlerinden en iyi zeno katilleri, Ölümnöbeti saflarında toplanır. Orada hizmet etmek büyük bir şereftir. Ben aslen Kan Melekleri Tümeni'ne mensuptum ve birçok savaşta yer aldıktan sonra Ölümnöbeti'ne katılmak üzere aday gösterildim."
languages.original_text: "By ancient tradition, the finest xenos slayers from all existing Astartes Chapters are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I originally belonged to the Blood Angels Chapter, and after many battles I was nominated to join the Deathwatch."

traits.locale_text: "Kadim gelenek gereği mevcut tüm Astartes Tümenlerinden en iyi zeno katilleri, Ölümnöbeti saflarında toplanır. Orada hizmet etmek büyük bir şereftir. Ben aslen Kan Melekleri Tümeni'ne mensuptum ve birçok savaşta yer aldıktan sonra Ölümnöbeti'ne katılmak üzere aday gösterildim."
